sources.sql: 'SELECT id, alert_type, severity, title, message, metric_value, threshold, module_link, is_read, is_resolved, created_at FROM platform_alerts WHERE portfolio_id = %(pid)s ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT %(lim)s'

children.name: _get_engine
children.ret: Engine(postgresql://postgres.kytzcbipsghprsqoalvi:***@aws-1-us-east-2.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres)

sources.sql: "SELECT reporting_year, AVG(CASE WHEN metric_type = 'waci' THEN CASE WHEN glidepath_value > 0 THEN GREATEST(0, 100 - ((actual_value - glidepath_value) / glidepath_value * 100)) ELSE 50 END END) AS climate_score FROM pcaf_time_series WHERE portfolio_id = %(pid)s AND actual_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY reporting_year ORDER BY reporting_year ASC LIMIT %(w)s"
